title: daphne × neapolitana
intro: Daphne × neapolitana, also known as the Neapolitan Daphne, is a hybrid plant species within the Daphne genus, known for its fragrant flowers and glossy leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. The health benefits of Daphne × neapolitana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can help to protect against infections. Herbal preparations of Daphne × neapolitana can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
